name: Harvestopia
short_description: Dive into a charming pixel art world where managing your farm becomes a constantly evolving adventure. Start with limited resources and transform your land into a thriving agricultural enterprise through crops, livestock, and impressive constructions like windmills.
detailed_description:
Dive into a charming pixel art world where managing your farm becomes a constantly evolving adventure. Start with limited resources and transform your land into a thriving agricultural enterprise through crops, livestock, and impressive constructions like windmills.

As the seasons change and the map expands, unlock new possibilities to upgrade and automate your activities.

Features:

  • Building and management: Create your farm starting from crops, livestock, and advanced structures.

  • Dynamic progression: Unlock new areas and features as your farm grows.

  • Seasonal variations: Adapt your strategies to the changing seasons.

  • Engaging interaction: Speed up production by clicking on constructions to gather resources faster.

  • Upgrades and Automation: Make your operations more efficient with enhanced buildings.

  • Simple controls: Move the camera with WASD and interact through point-and-click.
